mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates directly increase discount rates for equity valuations, compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 or forward returns are positive in >65% of rising rate periods over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 4.0 percent, labor market slack triggers recession fears that immediately suppress equity risk premiums and drive negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.0 percent, or signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous monthly increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate earnings growth and generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive 60-day returns in >55% of cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: A rising industrial production index during a monetary tightening cycle signals resilient supply-side capacity that offsets rate hike headwinds, producing positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases during tightening periods yield negative 5-day returns in >60% of observations, or regime-specific Rank IC falls below 0.03 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index exceeds 240, persistent inflation forces aggressive central bank policy expectations, compressing equity valuations and driving negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 240, or the threshold effect disappears when controlling for FEDFUNDS changes in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly gains in total nonfarm payrolls reflect expanding economic activity and wage growth, which directly boost corporate revenue forecasts and generate positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: PAYEMS increases fail to predict positive 20-day returns in >60% of cases, or Rank IC remains below 0.03 across all 3-year rolling windows in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between quarterly GDP growth and monthly retail sales indicates weakening consumer momentum relative to aggregate output, triggering earnings downgrades and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: The GDPC1-RSAFS divergence signal produces positive returns in >60% of triggered instances, or the interaction coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample forecasting.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase signals supply chain bottlenecks that constrain output and profit margins, leading to negative quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during recovery phases yield positive 60-day returns in >65% of observations, or regime-conditional predictive accuracy (Rank IC) drops below 0.02 in walk-forward tests.
